2019

  • `curl metals.live` microservice December 2019

    The microservice that outputs recent precious metal spot prices and market trading status in a *nix terminal by typing `curl metals.live`.

    nodejsmongodbmicroservice
  • API server December 2019

    NodeJS+MongoDB-powered API server providing recent precious metals rates as well as historical data.
